source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division — Postcards Collection
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: Sunset, Ketchikan
description: Historic gelatin silver postcard of Ketchikan harbor at sunset, with a small fishing boat moving through Tongass Narrows as the houses of the town rise on the wooded slope to the right. Produced by Fisher Studio between 1900 and 1940.
alt: Historic sepia postcard of Ketchikan harbor at sunset with a small fishing boat in Tongass Narrows
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-12 — downloaded from loc.gov and visually confirmed
